quoteId.description: SBQQ Quote Id. Use this OR quoteName. Get from find_SBQQ_Quote.

quoteName.description: Quote name if quoteId not available.

pricebookEntryId.description: PricebookEntry Id from find_PricebookEntry. Prefer using find_PricebookEntry first with pricebookId and productName/productCode.

productId.description: Product2 Id. Resolved via quote pricebook. Use productName or pricebookEntryId when possible.

productName.description: Product name. Handler looks up PricebookEntry from quote's pricebook. Use find_PricebookEntry first to confirm product exists in pricebook.

pricebookId.description: Override pricebook for lookup (default: quote's SBQQ__PriceBook__c or standard). Get from find_Pricebook.

requiredByQuoteLineId.description: Parent quote line Id for bundle/option lines. Set this to create a bundle child line (SBQQ__RequiredBy__c).
